subcodes.first_line: Reflect upon the bounty of thy Lord, for He remembereth thee by virtue of thy remembrance. By My life! Wert thou to recognize this bounty with true recognition [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تفکر فی فضل مولیک انه یذکرک بما ذکرته لعمری لو تعرف هذا الفضل حق العرفان
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment
